subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath made His proof known unto thee, taught thee His path, and revealed unto thee His vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی عرفک برهانه و علمک سبیله و اراک
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
